title: Idhu Enga Balle Lakka Lyrics Mankatha Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Karthik, Vijay Yesudas, Anusha Dhayanidhi
Song: Idhu Enga Balle Lakka
Lyrics : Gangai Amaren
Music Director : Yuvan Shankar Raja

Idhu enga Balle Lakka, nee kelu kokka makka
New type-u naakku mukka, aadiko kicka
Abhi sabbo acha acha, aandavan kan vachaan vachaan
Adi da dhool machan machan, vaangiko extra

Soodhila soodhu, adhu suthamaaga yethappa
Ulagellam poondhu adha oruti podappa

Thappu kooda thappaagadhu satham pottu sollappa
Naanga sonna vaartha kelu, kaiya korthu allappa

Hey.. thaana kidaikuma? santhosam thaan
Neeya eduthuko unakaagathaan
Veena polambuna vidiyaathappa
Vilakka yethuna iruttathappa
Mudiyaathadhu, padiyaathathu
Yethum kidayaadhatha idhuthaan kanakku
Vidiyaathathu, onnum puriyaathathu -ada
athuthaanada irutto iruttu

Thittam potu thatti paaru
Kitta serum thannaala
Vattam pottu, katti podu varum
Laapam unnaala

Veena thoonguthu pala kodithaan -atha
mulika vaipavan killaadi thaan
Olachi vazhave venaamada - pirar
ulaipil vahvadhe varam thaanada
Aasapadu, alave illa
Aambalaiku athuthaan azhagu
Kovapadu, kuraiye illa
Pombalaiku athu thaan poruppu

Thittam potu thatti paaru
Kitta serum thannaala
Vattam pottu, katti podu varum
Laapam unnaala

Idhu enga Balle Lakka, nee kelu kokka makka
New type-u naakku mukka, aadiko kicka
Abhi sabbo acha acha, aandavan kan vachaan vachaan
Adi da dhool machan machan, vaangiko extra

Soodhila soodhu, adhu suthamaaga yethappa
Ulagellam poondhu adha oruti podappa

Thappu kooda thappaagadhu satham pottu sollappa
Naanga sonna vaartha kelu, kaiya korthu allappa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Idhu Enga Balle Lakka is a lively track that celebrates joy and togetherness, encouraging listeners to enjoy life to the fullest.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in Mankatha, highlighting moments of celebration and camaraderie among the characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Anusha Dhayanidhi, Karthik, and Vijay Yesudas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Idhu Enga Balle Lakka was composed by the renowned Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 11, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Idhu Enga Balle Lakka, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the celebratory moments in Mankatha. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. The collaboration of Anusha Dhayanidhi, Karthik, and Vijay Yesudas brings a dynamic vocal performance that enhances the festive mood. Overall, the song conveys a sense of togetherness and the joy of living life to the fullest.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhu Enga Balle Lakka from Mankatha is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring a unique collaboration of voices from Anusha Dhayanidhi, Karthik, and Vijay Yesudas. With Yuvan's electrifying music and Gangai Amaran's catchy lyrics, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the infectious rhythm that perfectly captures the spirit of fun and festivity!
stanzaMeanings: This is our celebration, listen up everyone. It's a new style for me, let's have some fun. Everything is good, God has blessed us. Let's enjoy the excitement, take it all in.
It's all about the fun, that's the way it should be. The whole world is celebrating, let's join in together.
Even if it's wrong, it won't be a mistake if we say it out loud. Listen to what we say, don't ignore it.

Hey.. will it be okay? It's all about happiness. You take it for yourself. If you complain like a violin, it won't work. If you light it up, it will be dark. Nothing can be done, nothing can be achieved. That's the calculation. It won't work, nothing is understood - that's how it is, isn't it?
Make a plan and see. It will come to you naturally. Put a circle and tie it up, it will come. It's all because of you.

The violin is sleeping, it has been hit many times - the one who plays it is not a fool. If you want to live, you have to be careful - it's a blessing to be in someone else's words. Wanting is not enough. For a girl, that's the beauty. Being angry is not a problem, for a girl, that's the responsibility.
Make a plan and see. It will come to you naturally. Put a circle and tie it up, it will come. It's all because of you.
This is our celebration, listen up everyone. It's a new style for me, let's have some fun. Everything is good, God has blessed us. Let's enjoy the excitement, take it all in.
It's all about the fun, that's the way it should be. The whole world is celebrating, let's join in together.
Even if it's wrong, it won't be a mistake if we say it out loud. Listen to what we say, don't ignore it.
Mankatha Song Lyrics My friend, open the bottle. This is our celebration, my friend. Come on, let's go.
